evals.prompt: Find backlink opportunities for driftroast — who should link to us and how do we get into the best-of lists?
evals.expected_output: A priority-ordered link plan from link_prospects.py: fitting plays per node, a safe off-page anchor mix (low exact-match), a competitor backlink-gap worksheet, and — if web_search/DataForSEO is on — a ranked prospect queue with provenance on authority and no invented domains or emails.

assertions.text: off-page anchor mix keeps exact-match low (~10%)
assertions.name: anchor_safety

assertions.text: competitor backlink-gap worksheet seeded from entity-profile competitors
assertions.name: gap_worksheet

assertions.text: authority numbers are measured or blank, never guessed; no fabricated contact emails
assertions.name: no_fabrication

assertions.text: if T0 (no web_search/dataforseo), states discovery is unavailable rather than inventing prospects
assertions.name: honest_degrade
